- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. (Created in .github)

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (Requirements provided by user)

- [x] Scaffold the Project (Manual scaffold created; npm not available for Vite CLI)

- [x] Customize the Project (Implemented full sectioned portfolio template and data model)

- [x] Install Required Extensions (No extensions required)

- [x] Compile the Project (Docker build completed; dist/ generated)

- [x] Create and Run Task (Docker dev server task added and running)

- [x] Launch the Project (Dev server running; local preview opened)

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README and instructions up to date; HTML comments removed)
- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
